description:
Operating Area: Turkey

LIMITLESS Motoryacht is a special alternative for large groups of guests who are looking for luxury yacht charters. Bringing peace in the middle of the endless deep blue sea, the specially designed Limitless Motoryacht, refitted in 2022, is 56 meters long, 10.5 meters beam, 4 floors, and has a total area of ​​1650 square meters. She offers luxury accommodations in 13 cabins for 26+10 total 36 guests.

With her unlimited amenities and professional crew, she has been a tremendous success for small groups as well as large ones. LIMITLESS has great facilities where you can relieve all the stress of the outside world with her Turkish bath, massage room, and sauna. She features a full-beam Master lounge with 360-degree unobstructed views from large panoramic windows opening onto the relaxation area. While enjoying the panoramic view on the flybridge deck, you can have delightful moments with entering the jacuzzi. You will enjoy great food together in the huge restaurant hall, allowing you to spend unforgettable and unique moments.

crew.name: ONUR KÜÇÜK
crew.bio:
Age: 46
Language: Russian (beginner)
License: Yacht Master Offshore with Commercial RYA
Experience: 25+ years as a professional captain on private and charter yachts cruising the Mediterranean and Aegean coasts.

Skills:
Strong leadership and organizational skills
Excellent seamanship knowledge and experience
Commitment to guest satisfaction and safety
Ability to speak multiple languages

Personality:
Calm and reliable
Professional and welcoming
Problem-solving ability
Team player

crew.name: VAROL ÇAKIR
crew.bio:
Age: 54
Languages: English, German
License: Yacht Master Offshore with Commercial RYA, Highway Shift Officer
Experience: 30+ years as a professional captain on private and charter yachts cruising the Mediterranean and Aegean coasts.

Skills:
Strong technical skills
Expertise in ship systems and maintenance
Emergency procedures and first aid knowledge
Excellent communication and organizational skills

Personality:
Meticulous and attentive
Versatile and solution-oriented
Positive and motivating
Good communication with guests and crew

crew.name: SERDAL TAŞÇILAR
crew.bio:
Age: 50
License: Chief Engineer, Motor Mechanic
Experience: 25+ years in ship maintenance, starting on cargo ships and 18 years as chief engineer with extensive experience and knowledge.

Skills:
Diagnosis, repair, and maintenance of ship systems
Engine and generator repair
Electrical and electronic systems
Safety and environmental procedures

Personality:
Experienced and reliable
Problem-solving ability
Meticulous and detail-oriented
Team player

crew.name: YİĞİT KARABÖCEK
crew.bio:
Age: 45
Language: English
License: Yacht Master 149 GRT
Experience: 11+ years in the hospitality industry, 5 years in yachting.

Skills:
Guest services and accommodation management on luxury yachts
Excellent organizational and time management skills
Strong communication and hospitality skills
Team leadership and training ability

Personality:
Professional and welcoming
Attentive and detail-oriented
Energetic and motivating
Team player

crew.name: ELİF ÖZTÜRK
crew.bio:
Age: 23
Skills:
Cabin and stateroom cleaning and maintenance
Laundry and ironing services
Attention to guest requests and needs
Strong organizational and time management skills

Personality:
Meticulous and hardworking
Friendly and welcoming
Quick learner and adaptable
Team player

crew.name: MUSTAFA KUŞ
crew.bio:
Age: 44
Specialties:
Mediterranean cuisine
Turkish cuisine
International cuisine
Seafood
Experience: 10+ years as a chef on luxury yachts and Michelin-starred restaurants.

Skills:
Creating creative and delicious menus
Accommodating special dietary and allergy requirements

Additional Crew Information:
The crew undergoes annual first aid and maritime safety training.
There are also crew members who can speak different languages (English, German, French).
The crew strives to provide guests with a special and memorable experience
by showing special care and attention.

crew.name: EMİNE ÖZÜNÜR
crew.bio:
Age: 48
Experience: New to the yacht industry, but brings a passion for cooking, especially appetizers and cookies.

Skills:
Eager to learn and contribute to the galley team
Enjoys experimenting with new recipes and flavors
Has a talent for presentation and creating visually appealing dishes
Adaptable and willing to take on various kitchen tasks

Personality:
Enthusiastic and positive
Creative and resourceful
Hardworking and eager to please
Team player with a willingness to learn

Fun Fact: Emine loves surprising guests with her homemade treats and enjoys learning new culinary skills from Chef Mustafa.

crew.name: MUSTAFA ÇAKALLIKLI
crew.bio:
Age: 36
Skills:
Excellent guest interaction and communication skills, especially with children
Creates a fun and engaging atmosphere on board
Provides exceptional service and ensures guest comfort and enjoyment
Proficient in water sports and enjoys assisting guests with activities
Strong swimming and boating skills

Personality:
Friendly and outgoing
Energetic and enthusiastic
Patient and understanding with children
Highly motivated and dedicated to exceeding guest expectations
Team player with a positive attitude

Fun Fact: Mustafa is a natural with children and loves organizing fun activities on deck, from swimming races to watersports adventures.

crew.name: OĞUZHAN OKUTAN
crew.bio:
Age: 24
Skills:
Strong work ethic and takes pride in his duties
Highly motivated and strives for excellence in all tasks
Excellent safety awareness and prioritizes guest and crew well-being
Team player who actively collaborates with fellow crew members
Adaptable and willing to learn new skills

Personality:
Reliable and dependable
Detail-oriented and ensures all tasks are completed to a high standard
Calm and collected under pressure
Positive and solution-oriented
Eager to learn and grow within the yachting industry

Fun Fact: Oğuzhan is passionate about safety and enjoys sharing his knowledge with fellow crew members. He is always looking for ways to improve efficiency and safety procedures on board.
